---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with public docs, examples, or workbook behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Area

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Workbook
- [ ] Validation scripts

## What happened?

Describe the problem.

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected.

## Evidence

Include file paths, command output, screenshots, or sanitized sample data.

Do not include passwords, tokens, private keys, private endpoint details, or sensitive client data.
